data.body: f476 GREEN: discovered a real cascade TOCTOU bug (unlocked parent-open decision + locked parent claim => loser exit-10 abort, violating AC 'both children claimed' + single-agent contract). Fixed claim.py in scope (file_impact updated, decision commented on ticket): a cascaded parent claim that fails but leaves the parent no-longer-open is benign -> proceed to claim child. RED-before-GREEN: same-tracker test asserts both children claimed (RED pre-fix: loser exit 10; GREEN post-fix). Two-clone offline race test matches policy exactly (both P+C fork, resolved to FAST winner, losing claims survive). Documented same-tracker(serialized,no-orphan) vs offline(orphaned,fork) in concurrency.md. Regression file 21/21 alone. NOTE: pre-existing unrelated test-namespace collision (tests/unit/rebar_reconciler shadows engine pkg) fails test_a3 only under certain ad-hoc multi-file pytest orderings; not caused by this diff. Committing stacked on 1fdc.
